candidate_definition_hints.text: 7 community-maintained translations of MDN Web Docs in ES, FR, JA, KO, PT-BR, RU, and ZH, to learn and contribute in your native language.
:tada: First of all, thanks for taking the time to contribute to [MDN Web Docs](https://developer.mozilla.org)' translated content! :tada:
